in the plugin app while extracting the property details, while extracting the property summary, we take this section of html and iterate all the div elements with a class of 'proerptyDetailsSectionContentSubCon', we take the div id and take the section of the id after the '_' and lowercase the first letter to get the propertySummary object's key. It contains a label and a value that will need to trim the extra spaces, we need the propertyDetailsSectionContentValue to get the actual value. :
